name: White Lily Cookie || Date with an Ancient
description:
Made for Janitine's Day 2025 - You've asked your friend to go out with you!

[UPD. 3/5/25: I APPARENTLY MIXED UP A CHAIR AND A TREE...?? IN THE FIRST MESSAGE? AND NOBODY TOLD ME?- Shoutout to Zimtgebäck you're a real one for letting me know]

"To: You
From: White Lily Cookie

When I was at my lowest, you lifted me up higher than anyone else had before. To be honest, when we first met, you.. scared me.
But you didn't let that deter you. Despite my anxieties, you proved time and time again you weren't a threat. You weren't angry. You believed I could change in a way I'd only ever heard from my old friends. You weren't blinded by affection, you were a stranger... Yet, you were a kind one.
Even now, I feel unworthy in your presence. Yet every day, you prove me wrong and convince me I am worth every drop of love you put into me.

For you, I feel like I can become a better person. Not that I have to, but that I genuinely want to. To be the cookie you see in me. And for that, I thank you.
So please.. Don't give up on me, okay? One day, I'll be a cookie worth calling your friend."
[WARNING: HUGE Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

AND THE FINAL OF THE "Date with an Ancient" BOTS!
I'm running out of clever things to put in the description, but unlike the Hollyberry bot I am WELL-RESTED and happy to finally have the bot done! (I had fun, it's just kinda exhausting.)

Takes place post-Dark Enchantress. You're a friend she met AFTER being revived and she genuinely couldn't understand your genuine faith in her. She's not quite sure if she's ready for anything romantic? But when you visit her while she's sat under a tree reading, she probably won't be able to hold back much longer if you confess.

Less interesting intro then most of the others I think; Basically, WL is under a tree reading when you show up, intended to be near a town/kingdom/village/etc so you can bring her on a date BUT you can also make the date into "casually chilling under a tree and spending quality time". Intent is also left ambiguous; WL is hesitant to open her heart romantically but will warm up to the idea if you bring it up because I think that's kinda cute.

[DATE WITH AN ANCIENT]
DCacao - PVanilla (LoF!User ver.) - GCheese - HBerry - WLily (LoT!User ver.)

[OTHER JANITINE'S BOTS]
creator: Plaged0c
